SitesPage.header_description: Manage and search your sites. Each site can have multiple campaigns.
SitesPage.emptyState_description: Try another search or create a new site.
SitesPage.createSiteDialog_description: Sites allow you to organize your campaigns under a unique subdomain.

CampaignsPage.header_description: Create and edit the pages for this site.
CampaignsPage.emptyState_text: No campaigns have been created for this site yet.

Dialogs.deleteSite_description: This action is irreversible. The site {subdomain}, along with all its campaigns and data, will be permanently deleted.
Dialogs.deleteCampaign_description: This action is irreversible. The campaign {campaignName} will be permanently deleted.

AdminDashboard.noSubdomains: No sites have been created yet.

LoginPage.dontHaveAccount: Don't have an account? Sign Up

ForgotPasswordPage.title: Forgot Your Password?
ForgotPasswordPage.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.

AuthNoticePage.confirmation_description: We've sent a confirmation link to your email address.

AuthNoticePage.default_description: Please check your email for further instructions.
